content: DeviceNetworkEvents | where RemoteUrl has_any ("1.pcap", "bfv.bund.de", "bnd.bund.de", "bsi.bund.de", "cert.incident", "cyber.gc.ca", "cyber.go.jp", "cyber.gov.au", "cyber.int", "cyber.nsa.gov")
DeviceNetworkEvents | where RemoteUrl has_any ("machine.config", "mail.cisa.dhs.gov", "uscg.mil", "web.config")

DeviceNetworkEvents | where RemoteUrl has_any ("blog.sekoia.io", "blog.talosintelligence.com", "cisecurity.org", "clickfix-attacks-sector-alert-tlpclear.pdf", "hhs.gov", "mail.cisa.dhs.gov", "processhacker-2.39-bin.zip", "qrpce91.exe.asd", "stopransomware.gov", "tmp41.wasd")
DeviceNetworkEvents | where RemoteUrl has_any ("win32kfull.sys")
DeviceNetworkEvents | where RemoteUrl has_any ("libdispatch.dylib")
DeviceNetworkEvents | where RemoteUrl has_any ("docs.metasploit.com", "leakix.net")
DeviceNetworkEvents | where RemoteUrl has_any ("app.gainsight.com", "www.rapid7.com")
DeviceNetworkEvents | where RemoteUrl has_any ("isc.sans.edu", "www.gsocket.io", "zone-xsec.com")
DeviceNetworkEvents | where RemoteIP in ("28.1.2.1", "4.3.2.8", "6.0.7.1", "7.1.0.30")
DeviceNetworkEvents | where RemoteIP in ("193.23.199.88")
